debug_info.goal:
case cons
a : Type
x : a
inst✝ : Inhabited a
t : Chapter8.S1.Tree a
ts : List (Chapter8.S1.Tree a)
ih :
  Chapter8.S1.spine a
      (@List.foldl (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree.node a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x) ts) =
    Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x :: ts
⊢ Chapter8.S1.spine a
      (@List.foldl (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree a) (Chapter8.S1.Tree.node a)
        (Chapter8.S1.Tree.node a (Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x) t) ts) =
    Chapter8.S1.Tree.leaf a x :: t :: ts

proof:
have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (xs : List (Tree a)), 
               spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc xs) = spine acc ++ xs := by
      intro acc xs
      induction xs generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons y ys ihy => 
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ihy]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]
failed_attempts:
have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro acc
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node acc t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (base : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node base ts) = spine base ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro base
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node base t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (u : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node u ts) = spine u ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro u
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node u t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (init : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node init ts) = spine init ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro init
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node init t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro acc
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node acc t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (u : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node u ts) ++ [t] = 
               spine (List.foldl Tree.node (Tree.node u t) ts) := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro u
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [← ih' (Tree.node u t)]
        rw [← ih' u]
        simp [spine]
    rw [← gen]
    rw [ih]
    simp

have gen : ∀ (base : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node base (t :: ts)) = spine base ++ (t :: ts) := by
      intro base
      induction ts generalizing base t with
      | nil => simp [List.foldl, spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node base t) t']
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen (Tree.leaf x)]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro acc
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node acc t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have h : ∀ (acc : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro acc
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node acc t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [h]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc (t :: ts)) = spine acc ++ (t :: ts) := by
      intro acc
      induction ts generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp [List.foldl, spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        simp only [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node acc t)]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen (Tree.leaf x)]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro acc
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node acc t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (u : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node u ts) = spine u ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro u
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node u t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have h : ∀ (u : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node (.node u t) ts) = spine u ++ [t] ++ ts := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' =>
        intro u
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (.node u t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [h (.leaf x)]
    simp [spine]

have aux : ∀ (u v : Tree a), spine (List.foldl Tree.node (Tree.node u v) ts) = 
               spine (List.foldl Tree.node u ts) ++ [v] := by
      induction ts with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons t' ts' ih' => 
        intro u v
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih' (Tree.node u v) t']
        rw [ih' u (Tree.node v t')]
        simp [spine]
    rw [aux]
    rw [ih]
    simp
successful_attempts:
have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (xs : List (Tree a)), 
               spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc xs) = spine acc ++ xs := by
      intro acc xs
      induction xs generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons y ys ihy => 
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ihy]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (l : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc l) = spine acc ++ l := by
      intro acc l
      induction l generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons h tl ih => 
        simp [List.foldl, ih, spine]
    simp [gen, spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (ts : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      intro acc ts
      induction ts generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t' ts' ih' => 
        simp [List.foldl, spine]
        rw [ih']
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (u : Tree a) (vs : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node u vs) = spine u ++ vs := by
      intro u vs
      induction vs generalizing u with
      | nil => simp
      | cons v vs ih_vs => 
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ih_vs]
        simp [spine]
    rw [gen]
    simp [spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (l : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc l) = spine acc ++ l := by
      intro acc l
      induction l generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (ts : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      intro acc ts
      induction ts generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t ts ih => 
        simp [List.foldl, ih, spine]
    simp [gen, spine]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (ts : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      intro acc ts
      induction ts generalizing acc with

have aux : ∀ (u v : Tree a) (ws : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node (Tree.node u v) ws) = spine u ++ [v] ++ ws := by
      intro u v ws
      induction ws generalizing u v with
      | nil => simp [spine]
      | cons w ws' iw => 
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [iw]
        simp [spine]
    rw [aux]
    simp [spine]

have aux : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (ts : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      intro acc ts
      induction ts generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons t ts ih =>

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (l : List (Tree a)),

      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by

have aux : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (rest : List (Tree a)),
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc rest) = spine acc ++ rest := by
      intro acc rest
      induction rest generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp
      | cons r rs ihr =>
        simp [List.foldl]
        rw [ihr]

have gen : ∀ (acc : Tree a) (ts : List (Tree a)), 
      spine (List.foldl Tree.node acc ts) = spine acc ++ ts := by
      intro acc ts
      induction ts generalizing acc with
      | nil => simp

        simp [List.foldl, ih, spine]
